notes: SQ-2 field-surface consumer. Reads the 1.x NON-STANDARD top-level `content` response field (ChatReply(content)). 2.0 does not emit top-level `content` (contracts §1.3 dropped list) — this is a HARD contract-diff hit: pinakes must migrate to choices[0].message.content, or top-level content is promoted to (dual, migration). Also note the path is /v1/chat, not /v1/chat/completions.
